notes:
## ✨ v2.0.12 — Config UX Improvement

### New Features
* **Deselect All Actors**: Added a button next to the actor search bar to deselect all selected actors at once (GM only).

---

## ✨ v2.0.11 — Per-Attribute Font Size & PF2E Fixes

### New Features
* **Per-Attribute Font Size**: Each tracked attribute now has individual Label Font Size (LF) and Value Font Size (VF) controls. Works across all 6 themes and all display types (Bar, Number/Text, Dots, Badge).

### Bug Fixes
* **PF2E: Non-Strike Weapons Not Detected**: Fixed weapons with non-standard action types (e.g., area-fire) not appearing in the Strike menu. Also added support for altUsages — weapons with alternative attack modes now show additional attack/damage buttons.
* **PF2E: Unequipped Weapons Shown**: Fixed all owned weapons appearing in the Strike menu. Now only equipped weapons are listed.
* **PF2E: Broken Shield Showing 0 HP**: Fixed shield HP forced to 0 when broken. Now displays actual remaining HP with a strikethrough indicator.
* **Value Text Clipping**: Fixed bar value text being clipped by clip-path in Iron and Glass themes.

announcement.title: ✨ v2.0.9–2.0.12: Font Size, PF2E Fixes & Config UX
announcement.content: New: Deselect All button for actor list. Per-attribute Label/Value font size controls (LF/VF). PF2E: fixed non-standard weapons, unequipped weapons showing, and broken shield HP. Also fixed value text clipping, config data loss, and scrollable tooltips.
